summary:
Claim: Nitrous oxide can cause paradoxical excitement in children.  
Evidence: - Children’s developing central nervous systems have reduced inhibitory control, making them more susceptible to excitatory effects. - Nitrous oxide may impair GABAergic inhibition during early brain development, amplifying this risk.  
Answer: C
